prerequisites.value: Augment Summoning, Spell Focus ( conjuration ), half-orc or orc.

description.value: **Benefit:** Creatures you summon gain the ferocity universal monster ability. FAQ How does this ability work if a summoned creature disappears when it reaches 0 hp? The summoned creature does not disappear at 0 hp, instead it disappears when killed (when its current hp get to a negative amount equal to its Constitution score). [ Source ]
